use_cases: Primary site navigation with expandable dropdown menus for organizing nested pages
Hover-triggered navigation menus for quick access to subcategories
Responsive navigation bars for SaaS and web applications
ai_summary: A dropdown navigation component featuring smooth Framer Motion animations with a pill-shaped hover background effect. The component renders a horizontal navigation bar with expandable dropdown menus triggered on hover, displaying a rotating chevron indicator and smooth entrance animations for submenu content. Designed for clean, modern web interfaces requiring accessible navigation hierarchies.
